confidence_rationale: Camera angle and video quality make it difficult to assess precise suture placement relative to marks and exact knot positioning. Completion time clearly observable.
cannot_determine: Exact deviation from marks in millimeters due to camera angle and distance
Precise knot security assessment from this viewing angle
Whether suture passed through both marks accurately
technique_summary: Novice-level performance with appropriate extracorporeal technique but significantly prolonged execution time, particularly in knot pushing phase (200s vs 20-40s expert benchmark).
strengths: Task completion without apparent drain damage
improvement_suggestions: Practice knot pushing technique to reduce time from 200s to under 60s
Work on overall task efficiency to achieve sub-200s completion time
Focus on smoother transitions between task phases
